title: Wizard Gold
description:
Wizard Gold is an incremental game about an ancient stone that turns wood into gold. You collect fallen wood and feed it to the stone for gold, then hire wizards to gather for you, buy upgrades, and cast spells to earn even faster. The more you feed the stone, the stronger it gets, and your world slowly turns to gold. When progress slows down, prestige to start over with permanent bonuses that help you feed the stone even more. 

Collect fallen wood and feed it to the stone.

Feed the stone enough, and watch it evolve.

Cast spells like Wood Rain to earn faster.

Prestige to start over with permanent power.
description_short: An incremental game about an ancient stone that turns wood into gold. You collect fallen wood and feed it to the stone for gold, then hire wizards, buy upgrades, and cast spells. Prestige to start once again with permanent power to help you feed the stone even more.
